evals.prompt: I want to enable devquest for my project with a fantasy theme
evals.expected_output: Prompts for environment (CLI/Desktop), theme (Fantasy selected), display mode (Markdown/HTML). Creates .devquest/state.json with level 1, 0 XP, 0 gold. Shows fantasy-themed welcome message.

evals.prompt: Show me my devquest character sheet
evals.expected_output: Reads .devquest/state.json, displays full character sheet with level, XP bar using = and - characters, gold, achievements, weekly stats, attributes, and active buffs in the configured display mode.

evals.prompt: I want to buy a Test XP Boost from the devquest shop
evals.expected_output: Reads economy.md, shows shop catalog with prices and current gold. Processes purchase if enough gold: deducts 30 gold, adds buff with 10 actions remaining. Shows confirmation.
